created_for_task: Task checkbox-3: Add public PP&D seed manifest and crawler allowlist for Portland.gov, DevHub, PortlandOregon.gov, and Portland Maps references.
global_requirements: Respect robots.txt and published crawl restrictions before fetching.
Fetch public pages and public linked documents only.
Do not use authenticated sessions, credentials, cookies, private browser state, or user account data.
Do not automate CAPTCHA, MFA, account creation, payment, submission, certification, cancellation, upload, password recovery, or other consequential actions.
Store skipped URLs with a reason code instead of retrying disallowed or private URLs.

allowed_hosts.scope: PP&D public guidance, forms, handouts, checklists, process pages, DevHub public help pages, and linked public documents.
allowed_hosts.link_follow_policy: Follow public links relevant to PP&D permitting, DevHub guidance, forms, handouts, and checklists after robots preflight.

allowed_hosts.scope: Public DevHub portal landing and unauthenticated help or reference pages only.
allowed_hosts.link_follow_policy: Discover public portal metadata only; stop before sign-in, registration, account, draft, permit, payment, inspection scheduling, upload, submit, or user-specific pages.

allowed_hosts.scope: Legacy PortlandOregon.gov public account and authentication references linked from Portland.gov or DevHub public guidance.
allowed_hosts.link_follow_policy: Follow only public guidance links needed to document DevHub account context; do not enter account workflows.

allowed_hosts.scope: Public permit, case, and property reference pages relevant to PP&D guidance.
allowed_hosts.link_follow_policy: Use as a public reference source only; avoid bulk property enumeration, private account areas, and high-volume lookup automation.

skip_reason_codes.host_not_allowlisted: URL host is outside the PP&D public crawler allowlist.
skip_reason_codes.robots_disallowed: Robots or crawl policy preflight disallowed fetching.
skip_reason_codes.path_not_in_scope: URL path is outside the allowed public PP&D discovery scope.
skip_reason_codes.private_or_authenticated: URL appears to require login, account access, private state, payment, upload, submission, or another restricted workflow.
skip_reason_codes.content_type_not_allowed: URL content type is outside this phase's public HTML/PDF discovery scope.
skip_reason_codes.consequential_action: URL appears to initiate or continue a consequential workflow action.
